title: Question: Can't get simple example to work

features.name: non_blocking_assignment_to_register
features.description: Code should include a register updated with non-blocking assignment in a clocked always block with async reset
features.snippet: always @(posedge clock or posedge reset) begin if(reset) in_del <= 1'b0; else in_del <= in; end

features.name: combinational_continuous_assignment_reading_clocked_register
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment that combinatorially reads a register updated via non-blocking assignment in a clocked always block

features.name: edge_detection_output_from_nba_register
features.description: Code should include an edge detection pattern where a combinational output depends on a registered delayed signal updated via non-blocking assignment
features.snippet: reg in_del; assign out = in_en && in && !in_del;
